title: Adi Aasa Machan Song Lyrics Kummi Paattu
stanzas:
Adi Aasa Machan Song Lyrics Kummi Paattu
#Ilaiyaraaja

Adi Aasa machaan
vaangi thantha malligapoo
adhu thaanaagathaan
thantha thammaa pullaripu. (3)

Aasa manasa thoondi athu
maaman manasa koorum
vaasa kadhava saathi
mella maranji paakka thonum

adi pechiyammaa maariyamaa
sendhu kummiyadi
en maamanukku thoothuvittu
paatu solliyadi.

Adi Aasa machaan
vaangi thantha malligapoo
adhu thaanaagathaan
thantha thammaa pullaripu.

Oada vazhi pogayila
avan oadi vanthu vazhi marichaan
kooda vanthu kusumbu panni
mella seelaiyathaan pudichizhuthaan

kattikethaan poren unna
katti katti thaan pudichaan
kattu pattu kattu pattu
naan kidanthen

kanna konja moodikitten
un madiyil saanjikitten
rekka katti rekka katti
naan parandhen

ada kannu muzhichaa
maamanathaan kaanavillai
anga nadantha kadha
aththanaiyum kanavukulla

Adi Aasa machaan
vaangi thantha malligapoo
adhu thaanaagathaan
thantha thammaa pullaripu.

thoadu onnu podanumnu
mella kaadha thottaan
kaadha thottaan.

kolusu onnu podanumnu
ada kaala thottaan
kaala thottaan

kaivalavi potu vida
kaiyi rendathan pudichaan
kannu renda
moodasollithaan iluthaan

mookkuthiya poatuvida
unmugatha thaan nimithi
nerukku ner munna vanthu
thaan sirichaan

ada kannu muzhichaa
maamanathaan kaanavillai
anga nadantha kadha
aththanaiyum kanavukulla

Adi Aasa machaan
vaangi thantha malligapoo
adhu thaanaagathaan
thantha thammaa pullaripu.

Aasa manasa thoondi athu
maaman manasa koorum.
vaasa kadhava saathi
mella maranji paakka thonum

adi pechiyammaa maariyamaa
sendhu kummiyadi
en maamanukku thoothuvittu
paatu solliyadi.

Adi Aasa machaan
vaangi thantha malligapoo
adhu thaanaagathaan
thantha thammaa pullaripu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Adi Aasa Machan?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Which movie features the song Adi Aasa Machan?

The song is from the Tamil movie Kummi Paattu.

Who are the singers of Adi Aasa Machan?

The song was sung by Arunmozhi and Swarnalatha.

What is the theme of the song Adi Aasa Machan?

The song celebrates love and joy in a traditional Tamil village setting.

When was the movie Kummi Paattu released?

The movie was released in the year 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adi Aasa Machan from the movie Kummi Paattu, released in 1999, features the talented actors Prabhu and Kushboo. Composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja and sung by Arunmozhi and Swarnalatha, this folk duet encapsulates the vibrant and joyous spirit of Tamil village life. The lyrics beautifully express themes of love and celebration, making it a cherished melody among fans. Its traditional rhythm and heartfelt rendition evoke a sense of nostalgia and cultural pride.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adi Aasa Machan from the movie Kummi Paattu is a delightful folk duet that captures the essence of Tamil village celebrations. Composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, this song features the melodious voices of Arunmozhi and Swarnalatha. Its vibrant rhythm and heartfelt lyrics make it a timeless classic cherished by fans of Tamil cinema.

Oh, dear friend, the jasmine flower you brought and gave me caused a delightful thrill.
The longing heart seeks, and the uncle's heart expresses. The fragrant door slowly opens, and it feels like peeking.
Oh, dear, speak and join the dance. Convey the message to my uncle and sing the song.
Oh, dear friend, the jasmine flower you brought and gave me caused a delightful thrill.
He didn't take the direct path but ran and changed his way. He came along, teased, and gently pulled the saree.
He tied me up and held me tightly, and I remained bound.
I closed my eyes and leaned on your lap. With wings tied, I flew.
When I opened my eyes, my uncle was nowhere to be seen. Everything that happened seemed like a dream.

He touched my leg, suggesting to wear an anklet.
